change_summary: Added a focused `BindingSpec` guard for the validation-adjacent direct-flex-child invariant via `checkNoGenFallback` before production refactoring.

Extracted `collectBoundChildren`, `tyVarChildFilter`, and `boundFlexChildren` into the new leaf module `src/MLF/Binding/BoundChildren.hs` so `MLF.Binding.Tree` and `MLF.Binding.Validation` share one implementation without a module cycle.
Removed the duplicate helper bodies from both `src/MLF/Binding/Tree.hs` and `src/MLF/Binding/Validation.hs`, updated imports, and registered the new module in `mlf2.cabal`.
Updated `CHANGELOG.md` and maintained the required task-tracking artifacts under `tasks/todo/2026-03-09-bound-child-helper-consolidation/`.

Validation passed: focused `boundFlexChildren returns flex TyVar` and `checkNoGenFallback accepts forall binders with direct flex children`, then full `cabal build all && cabal test` with `1006 examples, 0 failures`.
